ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., CSV, API) */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* The format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, API) */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* The size of the dataset in bytes or number of rows */,
  "column_names" TEXT /* A list of column names in the dataset */,
  "column_types" TEXT /* A list of column types in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used (e.g., Random Forest, SVM) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used to train the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* The type of the model (e.g., supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement learning) */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* The version of the machine learning algorithm used */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the model */,
  "base_model_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the base model (if any) that this model was derived from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "importance_score" REAL /* Importance score of the feature as determined by the model */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the feature */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* The data type of the feature (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "is_target" INTEGER /* Whether the feature is a target variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric (e.g., Accuracy, F1 Score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* The method used to evaluate the model (e.g., cross-validation, holdout) */,
  "evaluation_metric" TEXT /* The specific metric used to evaluate the model (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "evaluation_parameters" TEXT /* Any additional parameters used in the evaluation (e.g., number of folds for cross-validation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* A hash of the user's password for authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model related to this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Notes describing changes or improvements in this version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being acted upon */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., trained, deployed, evaluated) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the action taken */,
  "action_parameters" TEXT /* Any additional parameters related to the action (e.g., hyperparameters used for training) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_importance" (
  "importance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each importance entry */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the feature */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "importance_score" REAL /* Importance score of the feature for the specific model */,
  "importance_rank" INTEGER /* The rank of the feature importance (e.g., 1 for the most important feature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("importance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_importance_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_importance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that made the prediction */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data used for the prediction */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted output value */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_probability" REAL /* The probability of the predicted outcome */,
  "prediction_confidence" REAL /* The confidence level of the predicted outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that these settings apply to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the setting */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* The default value of the parameter (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_settings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
